continuation.kind: page = server next-link, chunk = local split of an oversized result
continuation.url: Pass this to the paginate tool to fetch the next portion
prefetch.pages: Upstream FHIR pages fetched and merged
prefetch.upstreamEntries: Total entries seen across upstream pages
bundle.entries: Number of entries returned in this response (a single page, or the coalesced total across prefetched pages)
bundle.total: The server's self-reported Bundle.total match count, passed through verbatim. NOT the returned entry count and NOT authoritative for completeness — servers may omit it, approximate it, or report the page size. Use hasMore/continuation to decide whether more exist, never total.
bundle.jsonBytes: Serialized byte size of the FHIR payload
artifact.status: Always ok — an artifact was produced
artifact.notes: Human-readable notes (e.g. ignored JSON-only shaping arguments)
artifact.resource: Source FHIR resource type when known
artifact.fhirId: Source FHIR resource id when known
artifact.byteCount: Actual decoded byte count of the content
artifact.uri: Stable private artifact URI (no upstream credentials)
artifact.checksum: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the decoded bytes
artifact.object: Artifact metadata — the content is delivered as an MCP embedded resource, not here
fhir.status: truncated = payload was too large and partially withheld
fhir.responseMode: Shape of data: compact (AI-oriented) or full (raw FHIR)
fhir.compacted: Whether compaction was applied to data
fhir.truncated: Whether the payload was truncated by the byte limit
fhir.isBundle: Whether data is a FHIR Bundle
fhir.hasMore: THE pagination signal — true when more results exist; use continuation.url
fhir.resourceType: FHIR resourceType of data when data is a single resource or Bundle
fhir.fhirpathFiltered: Whether a FHIRPath expression filtered data locally
fhir.fhirpathMatchCount: Number of FHIRPath matches when filtered
fhir.bundle: Bundle counters when data is a Bundle
fhir.continuation: Where to fetch the remainder when hasMore is true
fhir.data: The shaped FHIR resource, Bundle, or FHIRPath node array; omitted when truncated
capabilities.available: false when the server CapabilityStatement is unavailable
capabilities.grantedScope: Effective granted SMART scope for this caller
capabilities.skippedTools: Tools skipped by metadata or scope gating
terminologyLookup.found: Whether the code resolved to a display
terminologyLookup.inactive: Whether the code is marked inactive
codeSearch.total: Known match count: server-reported for SNOMED; locally cached, filtered, and potentially incomplete for LOINC until hasMore is false
codeSearch.hasMore: Whether more results exist beyond this page
codeSearch.nextOffset: offset value for the next page when hasMore
codeSearch.fallback: Broadened term used when no exact matches were found
